description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular projector with a sleek, matte black exterior. The front face features a prominent circular lens assembly, slightly protruding from the body, and a small indicator light to the left of the lens. The top surface has a single, oval-shaped button, likely for power or control, and a subtle, flush design. The rear side is dominated by a large, black display or screen area, possibly for touch controls or status display. The sides are plain, with one side showing a small rectangular port or cover, likely for connectivity or access to internal components. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black projector with a prominent front lens, minimal controls, and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large circular lens and a small indicator light on a smooth, featureless black surface.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the lens protrusion and a small rectangular port or cover near the bottom.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a large, black screen or display area, occupying most of the surface.
description_view_3: The right side view is plain, showing only the lens protrusion and a single button on the top.
attribute_lens_type: fixed; large circular lens with no visible adjustment rings
attribute_control_panel_design: Single oval button on the top surface; no other visible controls or labeling
